title: OREGON PROJECT INDEPENDENCE – MEDICAID - 211info
text: UNION COUNTY OREGON PROJECT INDEPENDENCE – MEDICAID Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides in-home care. Services include housekeeping, personal care, laundry, shopping, transportation, and meal preparation and delivery. Adult day services (non-residential community-based programs, providing services for part of the day). Registered nurse services (one-time or intermittent assessment, service planning, medication monitoring, provider training, and education). Also offers case management and options counseling (counseling to support informed decision-making on services based on strengths, needs, and preferences). Service hours per person vary depending on assessed need and funding amounts. Hours may range from 5-20 hours a month. Benefits will not be subject to estate recovery. 1504 Albany Street La Grande, OR 978502621 Eligibility: Adults, age 18 and older, who meet the following criteria: -Need help from another person with personal care tasks -Income no greater than 400% of the Federal Poverty Level -Assets no greater than the average cost of six months in a nursing facility -Currently living in their own home and not a provider-operator or owned facility or foster/care home Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-noon and 1pm-5pm Email (541) 963-7532 1101 . Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 963-7532 ext 1101 Care Coordinator Lynette Barber [email protected] Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more information; some services may have a waitlist FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: Union County SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 9am-noon and 1pm-5pm Services: Adult Day Programs * Adults With Disabilities/Health Conditions * Medicaid Recipients Adult Day Programs * Medicaid Recipients * Older Adults Case/Care Management * Adults With Disabilities/Health Conditions * Medicaid Recipients Case/Care Management * Medicaid Recipients * Older Adults Disability Related Transportation * Medicaid Recipients Errand Running/Shopping Assistance * Adults With Disabilities/Health Conditions * Medicaid Recipients Errand Running/Shopping Assistance * Medicaid Recipients * Older Adults Home Delivered Meals * Adults With Disabilities/Health Conditions * Medicaid Recipients Home Delivered Meals * Medicaid Recipients * Older Adults Housekeeping Assistance * Adults With Disabilities/Health Conditions * Medicaid Recipients Housekeeping Assistance * Medicaid Recipients * Older Adults In Home Meal Preparation * Adults With Disabilities/Health Conditions * Medicaid Recipients In Home Meal Preparation * Medicaid Recipients * Older Adults Personal Care * Adults With Disabilities/Health Conditions * Medicaid Recipients Personal Care * Medicaid Recipients * Older Adults Other Services Offered At This Location: FOOD - HOME DELIVERED MEALS HOUSING/SHELTER - RENT ASSISTANCE INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - OPTIONS COUNSELING INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - OREGON PROJECT INDEPENDENCE INFORMATION SERVICES - FAMILY CAREGIVER SUPPORT PROGRAM UTILITIES - UTILITY ASSISTANCE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
